text_block_list.text:
One day, right when lunch is about to end, I run
into Fuji Kiseki as she comes out of the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: What were you doing in the infirmary?
What were you doing in the infirmary?

text_block_list.text:
A small blister pack of pills falls from Fuji Kiseki's
pocket.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I have a little headache, so I just stopped by for
some medicine. That's all!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll be going now. Byyyeee!

Despite her best efforts to hide her symptoms, it
seems Fuji Kiseki is suffering from quite the
migraine...
